impeccable.name: Impeccable — Design harness (anti-AI-slop)
impeccable.description: Design language + 18 commands for frontend quality.

tutorial.title: Install Impeccable
tutorial.body:
Run `npx skills add pbakaus/impeccable` in your project root. Auto-detects the AI tool.

Manual per tool:
- Claude Code (global): `cp -r dist/claude-code/.claude/* ~/.claude/`
- Cursor: `cp -r dist/cursor/.cursor your-project/` (needs Nightly + Agent Skills enabled)
- Codex: `cp -r dist/codex/.codex/* ~/.codex/`
- Gemini: `cp -r dist/gemini/.gemini your-project/` (install preview: npm i -g @google/gemini-cli@preview)

shadcn-skills.name: shadcn/ui skills — Component library context
shadcn-skills.description: Injects shadcn/ui component catalog into AI context.

tutorial.title: Install shadcn/ui skills
tutorial.body:
Run `pnpm dlx skills add shadcn/ui` (or `npm`/`yarn`/`bun` equivalent) in your project root. Works cross-tool.

Prerequisite: project has `components.json` (shadcn/ui initialized via `npx shadcn@latest init`).

superpowers.name: Superpowers — Skills framework
superpowers.description: TDD, systematic debugging, brainstorming, subagent-driven development.

tutorial.title: Install Superpowers
tutorial.body:
Superpowers installation differs by platform:

**Claude Code (official marketplace):**
`/plugin install superpowers@claude-plugins-official`

**Claude Code (community marketplace):**
`/plugin marketplace add obra/superpowers-marketplace`
`/plugin install superpowers@superpowers-marketplace`

**OpenAI Codex CLI:** `/plugins` → search "superpowers" → Install

**Cursor:** `/add-plugin superpowers` (Cursor Agent chat)

**OpenCode:** tell OpenCode to "Fetch and follow instructions from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/obra/superpowers/refs/heads/main/.opencode/INSTALL.md"

**GitHub Copilot CLI:**
`copilot plugin marketplace add obra/superpowers-marketplace`
`copilot plugin install superpowers@superpowers-marketplace`

**Gemini CLI:** `gemini extensions install https://github.com/obra/superpowers`
